posts.text:
Under the new ratings system, EVERYBODY except the Super Bowl broke records. Bad Bunny was a really Bad Decision. If we still practiced capitalism, Jay Z would be fired.


Front Office Sports (@FOS)

College basketball finished the regular season with record viewership.

Fox tells FOS it recorded its most-watched men’s basketball regular season ever, while CBS saw its most-watched regular season in seven years.

posts.text:
Who believes this? The buzz around women's college hoops regressed incredibly this year. They keep coming up with new ways to count viewers. It's a Ponzi scheme that speaks to how bad Super Bowl ratings were. Everybody's numbers went up EXCEPT the Super Bowl.


Yahoo Sports (@YahooSports)

ESPN networks had its most-watched women’s college basketball regular season since 2008-09 📈

South Carolina & LSU's Feb. 14 matchup led viewership with 1.7 million views 🔥

(via @ESPNPR)

posts.text:
Bam Adebayo's 83-point game is a disgrace to NBA legacy. I can't believe Pat Riley's organization was involved with this.

Video
posts.quote:

posts.text: More I think about it, Adam Silver should disallow Bam’s 83. Fine the Heat. Give the Wizards the victory. Punish all involved. Heat take an L, tanking Wizards take a W, and Bam loses the record. Problem solved.
posts.quote: More I think about it, Adam Silver should disallow Bam’s 83. Fine the Heat. Give the Wizards the victory. Punish all involved. Heat take an L, tanking Wizards take a W, and Bam loses the record. Problem solved.

posts.text:
Bam's 83 points make Sosa & McGwire look legit.

The NBA is in shambles. The Hawks should re-announce Magic City Night to take attention away from Bam diminishing Kobe and Wilt. NBA should be embarrassed.

posts.text: Bam scoring 83 points is not a good look for the NBA. It undermines the integrity, intensity, and structure of the game. This would be the equivalent of Rocky Bleier rushing for 2,000 yards. There's no resistance.

posts.text:
JD Vance & Erika Kirk?
Marco Rubo & Erika Kirk?

American political strategy must continue to honor our lord and savior, Charlie Kirk.

I admired Charlie Kirk. Shed real tears when he was assassinated. 

The idolatry must end.

posts.text: This bigotry is taught in the home, celebrated in popular culture, and reinforced in the church. It's powered by victimhood mentality and worship of black mothers. Sickening.

Bam Adebayo's 83-point game is a disgrace to NBA legacy. I can't believe Pat Riley's organization was involved with this.

Video

More I think about it, Adam Silver should disallow Bam’s 83. Fine the Heat. Give the Wizards the victory. Punish all involved. Heat take an L, tanking Wizards take a W, and Bam loses the record. Problem solved.

Bam's 83 points make Sosa & McGwire look legit.

The NBA is in shambles. The Hawks should re-announce Magic City Night to take attention away from Bam diminishing Kobe and Wilt. NBA should be embarrassed.

Bam scoring 83 points is not a good look for the NBA. It undermines the integrity, intensity, and structure of the game. This would be the equivalent of Rocky Bleier rushing for 2,000 yards. There's no resistance.
